title: Astra Abomina
description: A race to escape the abominations that wait...
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1aad6709f921f94390b7f0ff4de3b642af38d4d.png)
------------------------------------------------------------
The Overworld welcomes a new age - The Age of Abominations. Though we may never reclaim this land, we may yet claim another. As you journey through these treacherous lands, you discover the plans for a way to escape the Overworld - a new planet to call home. This is Astra Abomina.

## What is Astra Abomina?
Astra Abomina is a horror-themed modpack with a goal to escape to the stars. Fight a myriad of terrifying creatures as you work to build your spaceship to escape the Overworld.

## What kind of threats will I face?
Most abominations have claimed all those who tried to document them, but we do know that they lurk in the caves and the fog...

## How do I escape?
That will depend entirely upon your skills. Those brave enough to venture into the Overworld will find the means to escape it entirely, however, in this quest they may find the means to push back against the abominations and reclaim what was lost.
